overall.description: A third-person gameplay walkthrough along the Santa Monica Pier in GTA V during golden hour. The character walks along the wooden pier past amusement park attractions including a yellow roller coaster and Ferris wheel, transitions to views of the beach and mountains, and continues through a colorful amusement park promenade.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden pier walkway with amusement park attractions

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden pier with the ocean on the right and amusement park structures on the left

entered.detail: large yellow steel roller coaster structure with multiple loops
weathered wooden planks forming the pier walkway
calm blue ocean water extending to the horizon
blue metal safety railing along the pier edge
white painted wooden benches facing the ocean

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wooden pier walkway during golden hour, with a yellow roller coaster structure dominating the left side. The camera moves forward along the weathered wooden deck, passing white benches and pedestrians, with the ocean visible beyond the metal railing on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: pier with Ferris wheel and emerging beach views

agents.ego_description: continuing along the pier as the Ferris wheel comes into view and the beach becomes visible

green building with large Santa Monica signage
sandy beach shoreline becoming visible in the distance
distant city buildings along the coastline

segments.scene_description: As the camera progresses, the large Ferris wheel becomes prominent on the left, towering over the Santa Monica sign building. Around the 22-second mark, the view transitions to reveal the sandy beach and city skyline on the left, while the ocean shifts from the right to the left side of the frame as the pier curves.

scene_state.functional_zone: pier with panoramic beach and mountain views

agents.ego_description: walking along the pier with expansive views of the beach, ocean, and distant mountains

notable_agents.action: woman in green shirt and shorts running along the pier

entered.detail: hazy mountains visible in the distance beyond the beach

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the beach side of the pier, with the sandy shore and ocean waves now prominent on the left. The Ferris wheel and amusement buildings fall behind as distant mountains become visible. A woman in a green shirt runs past on the left, and the beach appears closer as the pier continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: amusement park promenade with colorful storefronts

ego character transitions from walking to running along the promenade

agents.ego_description: running through the amusement park promenade past colorful buildings and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in white shirt and brown shorts running ahead of the camera

entered.detail: vibrant amusement park buildings in green, purple, and yellow colors
brick-paved walkway replacing the wooden deck
tall street lights along the pier edge
concrete trash receptacles along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a paved brick promenade lined with colorful amusement park storefronts in green, purple, and yellow. The camera moves through a moderately crowded area with pedestrians walking and sitting on benches. Around 62 seconds, the character breaks into a run, following a man in a white shirt through the lively promenade area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a wooden pier that transitions from a view of amusement park structures to an expansive vista of the coastline. It begins on a weathered wooden deck during golden hour, moving forward past white benches and pedestrians with a yellow roller coaster dominating the left side and the ocean visible beyond the railing. As the camera progresses, the perspective shifts to reveal a towering Ferris wheel and the Santa Monica sign building. The scene then opens up as the pier curves, causing the ocean to shift across the frame and unveiling the sandy beach and distant city skyline.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that shifts from the open, natural expanse of the beachside pier into the vibrant, crowded energy of an amusement park promenade. It begins by gliding along the pier's edge, where the sandy shore and ocean waves dominate the left side as the Ferris wheel recedes and distant mountains emerge on the horizon. As a woman in a green shirt runs past, the camera moves further along the pier, bringing the beach into closer view before transitioning away from the coast. The scene then opens into a paved brick walkway lined with colorful green, purple, and yellow storefronts, moving through a lively crowd of pedestrians resting on benches. Finally, the pace quickens as the character breaks into a run, following a man in a white shirt deeper into the bustling promenade.
